revision.comment: Bot: Fixing double redirect to [[Template:Templates for archiving]]

revision.comment: trimmin

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]] on (CatAlot)

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Warchivenav]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing generated categories and pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Warchivenav]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Unknown user|en>Unknown user]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Warchivenav]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Changed redirect target from [[en:Template:Warchivenav]] to [[Template:Templates for archiving]]
Bot: fix double redirect to final target
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[:en:Template:Templates for archiving]]

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
I guess I am immediately moving more things than I thought with this template. But hope this goes well. My bot uses a different named header template so we are using it
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
